title: Recommended Next Steps

book.title: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails Library Developer Guide

content: Recommended Next Steps The Colang 2.0 getting started guide introduces you to a basic colang_2_getting_started_hello_world example, and then goes into colang_2_getting_started_dialog_rails , colang_2_getting_started_input_rails , colang_2_getting_started_multimodal_rails , and other Colang 2.0 concepts like colang_2_getting_started_interaction_loop and colang_2_getting_started_llm_flows . This only scratches the surface of what can be achieved with Colang 2.0. If you are an experienced developer and want to learn about the syntax and various features in details, we recommend going through the colang_2_language_reference documentation. Version 0.10.0 of NeMo Guardrails will add more examples including RAG and agents. Also it will bring support for the Guardrails Library, which will enable you to use any of the existing guardrails similar to Colang 1.0
